description_long: This object consists of a row of four modern, two-story houses arranged side by side, each with a private driveway and garage at the front. The facades are simple and geometric, featuring large rectangular windows and flat roofs. The rear of each house opens onto a private green backyard, bordered by a low hedge or fence, with wooden patio decks visible. The houses are separated by narrow gaps, and the overall property is set on a rectangular plot with a paved front area and landscaped rear gardens. The color palette is predominantly light gray and white, with green lawns and brown wooden decks adding contrast. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional, urban living.
description: A row of four modern, two-story houses with flat roofs, garages, and private backyards, featuring minimalist facades and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garages, driveways, and main entrances of all four houses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, the garages, and the separation between houses.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private green backyards, wooden decks, and large rear windows of each house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the green spaces and the side walls of the houses.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entryways with large garage doors, minimal ornamentation, and no visible porch or steps.
